latestIgtvVideos.caption: It’s summer, you’re shiny, why fight it? ✨👄 Lip Gloss in Holographic by @smearcrush
Follow us to the Friends of Glossier Summer Sale… because friends let friends take 20% off!!! The fun starts May 26th online and in stores. 📷 @jamesonsusi

Around the time of our launch in 2014, we started saying the phrase: You Look Good. It wasn’t something we often heard, or felt, from the beauty industry. Those three words captured it – that beauty is, above all, about being confident in your skin, wherever you are (AKA *now*)!

So we put You Look Good everywhere we could: in our stores, at Glossier HQ, on pocket-sized mirrors, and more. We want to capture a version of beauty — unedited, true-to-life, embracing a little weirdness — and celebrate all the things that make you, YOU.
A matte lip? Or glossy sheen? Whether the day calls for an easygoing, blotted lip (Generation G), a bit more balm (Ultralip) or maybe both! The Lip Finish Duo has you covered 💋
Cloud Paint in Puff and Beam ☁️🎨🌈
Don't wait around! Now is the time to gift (or get) Glossier this season. Head to Glossier.com 👀 to see when your order qualifies for delivery by December 24th (it varies based on where you live!).
Don’t wait around...you have until midnight PST to shop 20% off all things Glossier 🕑

A gift from us to you! Your very own Glossier cookie cutter, so you can whip up a dozen cookie butter treats good enough to eat 👄  Get it while it’s hot with any $50+ order (or get it by itself for just $5). Act fast! This is only available for a short time.
Danika + Sarah, our very own Product Development and Makeup Marketing Leads, swatched Monochromes and answered all of your pressing eyeshadow questions.

latestPosts.caption:
Meet the Glossier Sardine: a new, dewy-skin ritual to get you glowing from the inside out ✨

Made with our friends at @fishwife, the Glossier Sardine features wild-caught, olive oil–packed sardines for a glow from within 🐟 

Our tip: Pair with Futuredew for double the dew. Happy snacking 🙂👋

latestPosts.caption:
Soie feels like sun on skin, a swim in the afternoon, and staying a little longer than you planned.

Experience it now at Glossier (online + in store) and @sephora.

Meet the notes behind Soie: a spark of bergamot, soft white florals (evening jasmine + tiare water), layered with creamy rice milk and grounded in ambrox.

It starts bright, softens quickly, then stays with you — like a vacation that lingers.

Now available at Glossier (online + in store) + @sephora.
